questionHtml:
Urea, (H2N)2CO, is excreted by mammals and can be used as a fertilizer.

The structural formula of urea is shown.

Predict the electron domain and molecular geometries at the nitrogen and carbon atoms, applying the VSEPR theory.
markschemeHtml:
Note: Urea’s structure is more complex than that predicted from VSEPR theory.

[3 marks]

meta.title: The structural formula of urea is shown. Predict the electron domain and molecular geometries at the nitrogen and carbon atoms, applying the VSEPR theory.
